info.title: Task API
info.description: API для керування задачами: створення, оновлення, пошук, видалення та зміна статусу.

value.message: User created. Please check your email to verify.

post.summary: Register a new user and create an associated organization

409.description: Conflict - User or Organization already exists

post.summary: Refresh access token using refresh token (with Race Condition handling)

200.description: Tokens refreshed successfully OR already refreshed by parallel request

401.description: Refresh token missing, invalid, or expired

500.description: Server error while sending the contact form

get.description: Returns 200 OK if the application process is running. Used by Docker/K8s to decide if the container needs a restart.
Verifies if the application is ready to handle traffic by checking the database connection (Prisma).

get.summary: Get a paginated list of user notifications

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Number of the page to retrieve

patch.summary: Mark a specific notification as read

post.summary: Create a join request (senderId from token)

get.summary: Get all pending join requests for a specific organization
get.description: Returns a list of pending requests where the organization is the receiver. Accessible only by ADMIN or MODERATOR.

get.summary: Get details of a pending join request
get.description: Returns join request details. Accessible by the sender or organization staff (ADMIN/MODERATOR).

403.description: Forbidden - You don't have access to this request

content.example: View the latest technology headlines, gadget and smartphone trends, and insights from tech industry leaders.

409.description: User has already left a review for this target

get.summary: Get approved reviews ABOUT a user
Get approved reviews ABOUT an organization

get.description: View reviews across all types and statuses.

patch.description: Change review status to APPROVED or REJECTED.
Automatically resets status to PENDING for re-moderation.

200.description: Updated and status reset to PENDING
